title: Blog or Personal Site
description: A beautiful blog or personal website to share your writing and ideas
longDescription: A content-focused blog with article listings, category pages, an about page, and RSS feed. Perfect for writers, journalists, or anyone who wants to share their thoughts online.

questions.question: What do you plan to write about?
questions.placeholder: I write about sustainable living, urban gardening, and eco-friendly home tips...
questions.hint: This helps us design the right sections and categories.

questions.question: What should we call your blog?
Any specific pages or features?
questions.placeholder: Newsletter signup, photo gallery, reading list page...
questions.hint: Optional — you can always add more later.

styleOptions.title: Clean & Minimal
styleOptions.description: Lots of white space, elegant typography, let the content breathe.

styleOptions.title: Editorial
styleOptions.description: Magazine-style layout, serif headings, classic newspaper feel.

styleOptions.title: Dark & Moody
styleOptions.description: Dark background, warm accents, cozy reading experience.

features: Individual article pages with beautiful typography
systemPromptHint: You are building a blog. Use Astro with Tailwind CSS, with Markdown or MDX for blog posts. The blog should have a home page listing articles, individual article pages with good typography, category pages, an about page, and an RSS feed. Focus on readability and content presentation.
